title: gitmap export
description: Machine-readable shape emitted by `gitmap export <out.json>`. Top-level is a single object whose key order is contractual: version, exportedAt, repos, groups, releases, history, bookmarks. The five nested arrays are always present (`[]` when empty, never `null`) so consumers can rely on `jq '.repos | length'` style probes. Per-record key order within each nested array is NOT pinned by this schema — it follows Go struct field declaration order (deterministic in practice but not part of the v1 contract).

exportedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the export was produced.

groups.description: Group records with member repo slugs.
